text.title: Indie Mini-CRM Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of the Notion workspace artifact and the monthly pulse output.

forbidden.pattern: Fewer or more than 4 databases in the workspace (violates r1)
contact_type as multi-select OR free text (violates r2)
VIP count > 5% of total contacts (VIP discipline lost)
Outreach template kept in active rotation with response_rate < 5% over ≥ 30 attempts (violates r4)
Missing monthly pulse output for > 1 calendar month
last_touch_date_rollup absent or manually edited (must be computed)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Substitute Airtable for Notion with identical schema if contact count exceeds 5,000.
Sub-segment subscribers (free / paid / churned) via an optional tag, but contact_type remains single-select.
Adjust stall thresholds per operator-stated tempo with a documented reason.

list.item: contact_type uses the closed enum, single-select
VIP count is ≤ 5% of total contacts
last_touch_date computed via rollup, not manually entered
Today dashboard shows stalled contacts + outreach queue + partner renewals
Monthly pulse has all 5 fields populated
